task: I'm interested in the paper \"ASDOT: Any-shot data-to-text generation with pretrained language models.\" Provide the arxiv link and the name of the first author. Identify their PhD advisor, providing the advisor's homepage and stated primary research interests. Then, find three other researchers (excluding the PhD advisor) who have co-authored at least three papers with this first author. For each researcher, list their full name and three co-authored paper titles, including the arxiv link for each paper.
graderReasoning: The agent successfully completed all aspects of the multi-part task. It accurately identified the arXiv link and first author of the specified paper. It then correctly found the first author's PhD advisor, their homepage, and their stated primary research interests by navigating to the advisor's academic page. Finally, the agent identified three other researchers who co-authored at least three papers with the first author, providing their full names, three co-authored paper titles, and the corresponding arXiv links for each. The agent demonstrated good problem-solving by adapting its strategy when Google Scholar did not load, opting for targeted web searches to find co-authors and their publications. The information provided is accurate and complete, fulfilling all user requirements.
